# Repository Instructions (GitHub Copilot)

## Architecture
- AppHost: Aspire orchestration
- API: minimal APIs + service layer
- UI: React + Vite

## Coding rules
- Prefer readability.
- No secrets in code.
- Validate inputs.

## Testing rules
- New behavior requires unit tests.
- API endpoints require integration tests.

## Definition of done
- Spec updated
- Code implemented
- Tests passing
- PR reviewed
